intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“警察局来信 -> 去警察局 -> 自行车被找到 -> 正在运回 -> 二十年前被偷”的被动语态链条读顺。

sentences.text: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.
sentences.focus_zh: has been worried all week 表示这一周一直担心到现在，读的时候把 has been worried 连成一组。

sentences.text: In the letter he was asked to call at the station.
sentences.focus_zh: was asked 是被动；call at the station 这里是去警察局一趟，不是打电话。

sentences.text: Dan wondered why he was wanted by the police, but he went to the station yesterday and now he is not worried anymore.
sentences.focus_zh: why he was wanted by the police 是 Dan 的担心；but 后面转到现在不再担心。

sentences.text: At the station, he was told by a smiling policeman that his bicycle had been found.
sentences.focus_zh: was told 和 had been found 都是被动；a smiling policeman 说明这是好消息，不是吓人的场面。

sentences.text: Five days ago, the policeman told him, the bicycle was picked up in a small village four hundred miles away.
sentences.focus_zh: Five days ago 是发现时间；was picked up 是被发现并收起；four hundred miles away 要读出距离很远。

sentences.text: It is now being sent to his home by train.
sentences.focus_zh: is now being sent 表示现在正在被送回；by train 是运输方式，不是 police station 的 station。

sentences.text: Dan was most surprised when he heard the news. He was amused too, because he never expected the bicycle to be found.
sentences.focus_zh: most surprised 这里是 very surprised；amused too 是觉得好笑；to be found 保持被动语态。

sentences.text: It was stolen twenty years ago when Dan was a boy of fifteen!
sentences.focus_zh: was stolen 是被动；twenty years ago 是笑点的时间差，读前可以稍微停一下。
